findings.evidence: `rg` hit: `PrincipalKernel.lean:124:        exact ⟨g, hq⟩`; Mathlib exposes the stable API at `mathlib/Mathlib/GroupTheory/QuotientGroup/Basic.lean:102:theorem kerLift_mk (g : G) : (kerLift φ) g = φ g :=`.
findings.fix: Rewrite `hq` with `S.principalFunctionClassDivisor_mk g` (or `QuotientAddGroup.kerLift_mk`) before packaging the witness, e.g. `exact ⟨g, by simpa using hq⟩` with the simp lemma explicitly available.
findings.issue: `principalFunctionClassDivisor_range_eq_principalSubgroup` uses `exact ⟨g, hq⟩` after quotient induction, relying on `S.principalFunctionClassDivisor (QuotientAddGroup.mk g)` being definitionally the same as `S.principalDivisor g`.

summary: One proof still relies on undocumented definitional reduction through the quotient lift instead of the stable representative lemma.
